query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "achieving gold-medal-level olympiad reasoning via simple and unified s" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it investigates the same core mechanism (enhancing LLM reasoning capabilities via fine-tuning and alignment) and offers a canonical methodological contribution (Alignment Fine-Tuning) directly relevant to the user's topic of achieving gold-medal-level reasoning in LLMs.
